name: Multiband
explanation: A three-band dynamics processor for mastering. The signal is split into low, mid and high bands by two crossovers (~220 Hz and ~2.5 kHz), and each band is compressed independently with its own threshold so the lows can pump without dulling the highs. A shared ratio sets how hard each band squeezes; the bands recombine through a makeup/output trim. Controls: Low Thresh, Mid Thresh, High Thresh, Ratio and Output.
